generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance OccupancyActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart actuator controlling occupancy-based lighting and HVAC adjustments in the Living Lab facility, triggered by real-time occupancy data from motion sensors"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled HVAC actuator system that dynamically adjusts temperature and airflow based on predictive analytics and real-time environmental conditions"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting actuator implementing adaptive dimming schedules and occupancy-based control logic for energy efficiency"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motion occupancy detector embedded in the Living Lab facility, providing real-time occupancy status for adaptive control systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental temperature sensor measuring indoor air temperature with 0.1°C precision, feeding data to HVAC and lighting control systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor monitoring indoor air moisture levels with 2% RH accuracy, integrated with BCS for IEQ optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance MotionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Passive infrared motion sensor detecting human presence with 95% detection accuracy, triggering adaptive lighting/HVAC responses"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotionDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Indoor air quality sensor measuring CO₂ concentration levels with 50ppm resolution, used for ventilation optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance LightIntensitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ambient light sensor measuring natural lighting levels for hybrid lighting control strategies"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightIntensityDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance MotionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotionSensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

instance LightIntensityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightIntensitySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMBuildingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Comprehensive BIM model of the Living Lab facility containing all structural elements, device metadata, and control logic embedded within BIM elements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance DeviceMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic metadata model extracted from BIM containing sensor/actuator configurations, device IDs, and control logic specifications"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance PhysicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based simulation model generated in Unreal Engine 5 for energy/thermal performance validation and interactive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance OperationalDataStore : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Centralized runtime data repository storing real-time sensor readings, control commands, and performance metrics for the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, TemperatureDataTransmitted, MotionDataTransmitted, CO2DataTransmitted, LightIntensityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated transformation pipeline leveraging MDE for converting BIM models into runtime Digital Twin artifacts through model-to-model/model-to-text transformations"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange middleware enabling bidirectional communication between physical building components and the Digital Twin via MQTT protocol"
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Twin communication framework providing standardized extension points for custom service integration and runtime configuration management"
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization platform enabling interactive building simulation, real-time monitoring dashboards, and performance validation"
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring service providing real-time visualization of building operational parameters (temperature, humidity, occupancy) via Unreal Engine dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyStatusInsight, EnvironmentalParametersInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy consumption forecasting and occupant behavior modeling service using BIM-extracted BCS data for proactive optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionForecast, OccupantBehaviorModel
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic optimization service implementing reinforcement learning-based control policies for lighting/HVAC systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides HVACOptimizationAction, LightingControlAction
]

instance PerformanceValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Validation service assessing DT fidelity using Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric and comparing against baseline operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides ODTEScore, OperationalEfficiencyMetric
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy status derived from motion sensor data, used for adaptive lighting/HVAC control and space utilization analysis"
]

instance EnvironmentalParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive indoor environmental quality metrics (temperature, humidity, CO₂ levels) for IEQ validation and ventilation optimization"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionForecast : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis of energy consumption patterns based on historical BCS data and current operational conditions"
]

instance OccupantBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Behavioral modeling of occupant patterns to optimize space utilization and resource allocation in the Living Lab facility"
]

instance HVACOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic HVAC control command generated by reinforcement learning algorithms for energy-efficient temperature regulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adaptive lighting control command implementing occupancy-based dimming and natural light integration strategies"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ODTEScore : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Overall Digital Twin Entanglement metric quantifying the fidelity and interoperability between physical building components and their Digital Twin representation"
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyMetric : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance benchmark comparing DT-generated operational efficiency against baseline facility metrics for continuous improvement validation"
]

// C12: Environment/Component Relationships
instance LivingLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancyActuator, HVACActuator, LightingActuator,
             OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor,
             MotionSensor, CO2Sensor, LightIntensitySensor,
             BIMBuildingModel, DeviceMetadataModel, PhysicsSimulationModel,
             RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService,
             AdaptiveControlService, PerformanceValidationService
]

instance BuildingControlSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor,
             MotionSensor, CO2Sensor, LightIntensitySensor,
             EclipseHono, Ditto, ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Facilitates **real-time control signals** from the DT to physical building systems via standardized APIs integrated with middleware (e.g., Eclipse Hono/Ditto). The DT generates control commands (e.g., actuator triggers, lighting schedules) based on optimized policies (e.g., energy-efficient lighting control) and sends them back to the physical infrastructure for execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Operates on a **real-time to near-real-time** time scale, with synchronization rates determined by sensor data acquisition frequencies (e.g., 1–10 Hz for critical sensors like temperature/humidity) and DT service processing cycles. The framework ensures **low-latency bidirectional communication** (e.g., <100ms for control commands) to maintain fidelity between physical and virtual representations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A **service-oriented DT architecture** with a **centralized control hub** (DT Framework) orchestrating:
  - **BIM-based BCS components** (e.g., sensors, actuators) as core assets.
  - **Middleware layers** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for real-time data synchronization.
  - **Interactive visualization** (Unreal Engine) as a user-facing interface.
  - **Modular services** (e.g., optimization, analytics) deployed via extension points, enabling a **scalable, composable DT ecosystem** for AECO applications. The constellation ensures **interoperability** with external systems (e.g., IoT platforms) via standardized APIs."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire **building life cycle**, from:
  - **Design phase**: BIM-based modeling of static building geometry, spatial relationships, and device configurations.
  - **Construction phase**: Integration of BIM with IoT sensors and middleware for initial device commissioning.
  - **Operation phase**: Real-time monitoring, adaptive control (e.g., BOREALIS reinforcement learning), and data-driven optimization (e.g., energy efficiency, occupant comfort).
  The DT evolves dynamically, with runtime adjustments enabled by middleware (e.g., Ditto) and service extensions (e.g., DT engineers adding new analytics)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Ensures high fidelity and validity through:
  - **Semantic alignment**: BIM models are enriched with runtime semantics (e.g., sensor configurations, control logic) to minimize **semantic drift** (e.g., via MDE-driven transformations).
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) ensures low-latency data exchange (<100ms) to maintain physical-virtual coherence.
  - **Validation**: The **ODTE metric** evaluates the DT’s entanglement with the physical building, quantifying interoperability and architectural fidelity.
  - **Uncertainty handling**: Runtime data validation and error correction mechanisms (e.g., sensor redundancy) mitigate data inaccuracies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Utilizes **network protocols** for bidirectional communication:
  - **Eclipse Hono** and **Ditto** middleware for IoT device connectivity (e.g., MQTT, CoAP) and real-time data streaming.
  - **Standardized APIs** (e.g., RESTful interfaces) for DT-to-physical system control commands.
  - **Unreal Engine’s networking layer** for interactive visualization synchronization with the physical building.
  The architecture supports **decentralized twinning** via BIM-based segmentation, enabling scalable deployment across multiple physical assets."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed as a **scalable, cloud-native DT platform** with:
  - **Modular service hosting**: Extension points allow DT engineers to deploy custom services (e.g., analytics, control logic) without redeploying the core DT framework.
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) ensures low-latency data exchange between physical sensors and the DT.
  - **Interactive visualization**: Unreal Engine provides a **3D immersive environment** for monitoring and control, integrated with BIM models.
  The deployment is **BIM-centric**, leveraging BIM metadata for automated device modeling and runtime interface generation."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Enables **interoperability with external systems** via:
  - **Standardized APIs** (e.g., RESTful, MQTT) for integration with IoT platforms, BIM tools, and third-party analytics.
  - **Middleware bridges** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) to connect with legacy BCS or external sensors.
  - **BIM-based semantic alignment** to ensure compatibility with other AECO stakeholders’ models (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD).
  The framework supports **horizontal data exchange** for cross-DT collaboration (e.g., sharing optimization insights across buildings)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed in the documents, but implied to follow **AECO industry standards** for data governance:
  - **Physical twin (PT) ownership**: Sensor data and operational logs are typically owned by the building operator or facility manager.
  - **DT service provider ownership**: Custom services (e.g., analytics, control logic) developed by DT engineers may retain ownership of derived insights.
  - **Privacy considerations**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) may enforce **end-to-end encryption** and **data anonymization** for sensitive operational data (e.g., occupancy patterns). The framework prioritizes **compliance with AECO regulations** (e.g., GDPR for privacy) and **secure data transmission** protocols."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adheres to:
  - **BIM standards** (e.g., IFC, COBie) for semantic modeling and interoperability.
  - **AECO industry protocols** (e.g., IFC 4.0 for BIM data exchange).
  - **Digital Twin standards** (e.g., OGC Digital Twin Framework) for interoperability with other DT systems.
  - **Middleware standards** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for real-time data exchange.
  - **Unreal Engine’s industry-validated APIs** for interactive visualization.
  The framework includes **standardized extension points** for modular service integration, ensuring compatibility with future AECO standards."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Implements:
  - **Network security**: Encryption (e.g., TLS) for data in transit, authentication (e.g., OAuth) for DT service access.
  - **Physical safety**: Remote control commands are validated via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) to prevent unauthorized actuator triggers.
  - **Operational safety**: Real-time monitoring (Unreal Engine) enables immediate detection of anomalies (e.g., sensor failures) and triggers automated recovery protocols.
  - **Compliance**: Adherence to AECO safety regulations (e.g., fire suppression systems, emergency lighting) via BIM-embedded control logic.
  The DT framework ensures **remote operation safety** by enforcing access controls and audit logs for all DT services. "
]
